---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <h1>FA3 — Interactive Tools</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Financial Accounting 3 · Amsterdam Business School · University of Amsterdam<br>Matthias Uckert</p>

  <div class="tool-grid">
    <a href="DCF-Timeline.html" class="tool-card">
      <div class="icon">📐</div>
      <h3>DCF Timeline Generator</h3>
      <p>Visualize discounted cash flow timelines — map out coupon payments, principal, and present values.</p>
    </a>
    
    <a href="Accrued-Interest.html" class="tool-card">
      <div class="icon">⏳</div>
      <h3>Accrued Interest Simulator</h3>
      <p>Visualize discounted cash flow timelines — map out coupon payments, principal, and present values.</p>
    </a>
    
    <a href="Bond-Amortization.html" class="tool-card">
      <div class="icon">📊</div>
      <h3>Bond Amortization Schedule</h3>
      <p>Build and explore effective-interest amortization tables for bonds issued at a premium or discount.</p>
    </a>

    <a href="Impairment-ECL.html" class="tool-card">
      <div class="icon">⚠️</div>
      <h3>Impairment — Expected Credit Loss</h3>
      <p>Walk through the IFRS 9 expected credit loss model with interactive staging and calculations.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
```
